offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, inefficient data handling causes delayed quotes. We provide streamlined policy aggregation instead of manual data entry and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in aggregating and analyzing multiple insurance policy data efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where insurance brokers seek help

Community forums for sharing tools among brokers
try_it: Let users try data aggregation and basic analytics on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
